entries.definition:
y–d–y hand, palm, forearm, handle, to be handy, possession;
unity, power, assistance; to give, favour; to have influence on
others; to scatter. Of this root, three forms occur 121 times in the
Qur’an: يَد yad 22 times; يَدَان yadān 33 times and أَيْدِي aydī 66
times.

يَد yad [n., dual يَدَان yadān, pl. أَيْدِي ʾaydī] 1 hand (7:108) وَنَزَعَ يَدَهُ
and he pulled out his hand 2 control, power (2:237) أَوْ يَعْفُوَ الَّذِي بِيَدِهِ

1055
